title: Unified Trace Receipt Integration
description: An integration object connecting synchronization audit trace links and AI search trace integrations to a unified trace receipt bundle.

integration_id.description: Unique identifier for this unified trace receipt integration record.

sync_audit_trace_link_id.description: Identifier of the parent Sync Audit Trace Link record.

ai_search_trace_integration_id.description: Identifier of the parent AI Search Trace Integration record.

audit_case_id.description: Identifier of the related synchronization audit case.

audit_classification.description: Classification result from the synchronization audit.

bundle_id.description: Identifier of the unified trace receipt bundle.

standard.description: Name of the unified trace receipt standard or bundle model.

bundle_version.description: Version of the unified trace receipt model used.

bundle_ref.description: Path, URI, or repository reference to the unified trace receipt bundle.

bundle_hash.description: Optional digest or hash for bundle integrity checking.

component_receipts.description: Receipts or trace records aggregated into the unified bundle.

component_id.description: Identifier of the component receipt or trace record.

component_type.description: Type of component included in the unified bundle.

component_ref.description: Path, URI, or citation reference to the component.

role.description: Role of this component in the unified trace bundle.

integrity_hash.description: Optional digest or hash for component integrity checking.

aggregation_type.description: How component receipts are aggregated into the unified trace bundle.

aggregation_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the aggregation logic.

ordering_rule.description: Optional rule describing the ordering of component receipts.

deduplication_rule.description: Optional rule for handling duplicate or overlapping evidence references.

alignment_summary.description: Summary of how the unified receipt aligns audit, search, and trace evidence.

confidence_level.description: Confidence level for the evidence alignment.

conflict_notes.description: Known conflicts, gaps, or unresolved evidence tensions.

requires_human_review.description: Whether human review is required before treating the unified bundle as resolved.

reviewer.description: Human or agent responsible for reviewing this integration.

stores_full_source_content.description: Whether this integration stores full third-party source content. Recommended value is false.

stores_full_search_results.description: Whether this integration stores full search result pages. Recommended value is false.

stores_component_payloads.description: Whether this integration embeds full component payloads instead of references. Recommended value is false.

purpose.description: Purpose of the unified trace receipt integration boundary.

limitations.description: Known limitations of this integration record.
